channel.title: Fin vs History
channel.description:
For people who like listening to history but don't care what actually happened


Generated using Stephan5/podcasts.
channel.itunes:author: Fin Taylor & Horatio Gould

item.title: 1: The English Civil War (Part One) | Fin vs History
item.description:
It's podcast 2.0 ! And we begin with the only war there's ever been where there were no bad guys



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 2: The English Civil War (Part Two) | Fin vs History
item.description:
It's Cromwell, It's Ireland, It's juicy



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 3: Greek Myths (Part One) | Patreon Exclusive
item.description:
In the beginning, there was a fat man sat on a chair; and in the middle, and in the present day. It's tiring being Greek.



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 4: The Cuban Missile Crisis (Part One) | Fin vs History
item.description:
otherwise known as the tensest moment of The Cuck's War.

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: 106: Bin Sniffers, Wicket Keepers, Lily Gilders & Chuff-Slingers: Winston Churchill | Post War British Prime Ministers, 1945-1979
item.description:

Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 107: “Show us your Sunday Roast, Love!”: Anthony Eden | Post War British Prime Ministers, 1945-1979
item.description:
Antony Eden, always the bridesmaid, never the bride- but when he did finally get married he pooed himself at the altar. How much is he to blame for Suez,  Britain’s biggest humiliation on the world stage?



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 108: You've Never Had Your Prostate So Enlarged: Harold MacMillan | Post War British Prime Ministers, 1945-1979
item.description:
As a sign of how quickly things fall post-Suez, Britain elects its first openly cuck Prime Minister. How ironic, then, that a man who wasn’t getting any gets ousted by a sex scandal



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.description:

item.title: 155: The Belgrano was a War Fine | Margaret Thatcher & The Falklands (Part 3/6)
item.description:

item.title: 156: A Duke of Edinburgh Award With Live Ammunition | Margaret Thatcher & The Falklands (Part 4/6)
item.description:
The British land on West Falkland and the land war begins, fighting hand-to-hand combat over terrain built for lesbians, until finally, 1800 islanders and half a million sheep are free



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 157: The National Union of Racist Burnt Toast | Margaret Thatcher & The Falklands (Part 5/6)
item.description:
For too long, Britain’s communities had been indulging in a weird fetish for digging burnt toast out the ground whilst blacked up- so having defeated the Argies, Thatcher has a new target in her sights



Generated using Stephan5/podcasts

item.title: 158: Pull Yourself Up By Your Buttplugs | Margaret Thatcher & The Falklands (Part 6/6)
item.description:
By mummy’s third term she’s so high on her own supply that she thinks teaching kids about homosexuality will give them AIDS and decides taxing people for being poor is a great idea

item.description:
